---
title: "Khyati Parihar"
image: "IMG_8623_SnapseedCopy_SnapseedCopy 2.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:kparihar@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/khyati-parihar-961283174/
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/rsm-kparihar
---

Welcome to my website!

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.
